primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: geometric orbital path reinterpreted as force-mediated motion
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: celestial domain extended to include terrestrial phenomena
changed spacetime symmetry group from Galilean to Lorentz, altering boundary/topology of allowable frames
primitive_reasons.causal_inversion: light speed c goes from consequence of EM to driver of spacetime structure

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: biological fitness → market profit, reproduction → imitation, while preserving selection dynamics
physical microstates reinterpreted as probability distributions, thermodynamic entropy reinterpreted as information entropy

notes: units change is secondary to the conceptual reinterpretation

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: spins → neurons, couplings → synaptic weights, energy → activation rule, equilibrium → stored memory
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: lattice topology → fully-connected graph, statistical-mechanics ensemble → content-addressable memory space

notes: no dimensionality change (both binary variables), no stochastic toggle (both can be stochastic or deterministic), no time inversion or scaling

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: populations reinterpreted as concentrations, predation reinterpreted as autocatalytic reaction
surface area → entropy, surface gravity → temperature: geometric quantities reinterpreted as thermodynamic ones
primitive_reasons.dim_shift: entropy scales with horizon area (2D) instead of volume (3D), reducing effective dimensionality

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: energy flux → price volatility (structurally analogous quantity)
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: physical fluid domain → abstract price-time domain

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: quantum tunneling probability → thermal Metropolis acceptance, energy landscape → cost function
primitive_reasons.stochastic_toggle: quantum probability becomes classical thermal randomness

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: neutrality rate reinterpreted as a timing device
primitive_reasons.causal_inversion: neutrality (a statistical property of selection) becomes the driver of temporal calibration instead of selection driving fitness

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: rational choice → fitness, payoff → reproductive success
primitive_reasons.causal_inversion: agents' deliberate deviation → blind selection pressure
primitive_reasons.continuity_toggle: static equilibrium → population dynamics with replicator equation

primitive_reasons.dim_shift: point particles → field configurations raises effective dimensionality from finite DOF to infinite DOF (field at each point)
primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: trajectory q(t) reinterpreted as field φ(x,t), momentum p reinterpreted as canonical field momentum π(x)

notes: least-action principle preserved, no causal inversion or stochastic toggle

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: geometric symmetry operations reinterpreted as abstract group elements, conserved quantities as group invariants
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: domain shifted from discrete crystal lattice to continuous Lie groups enabling Noether’s theorem

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: chemical concentration → firing rate, catalyst → correlation
wave displacement → matter-wave amplitude, frequency → energy via E=hν
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: string fixed ends → atomic potential well boundary conditions enforcing quantization
primitive_reasons.continuity_toggle: classical continuous wave → discrete quantum energy levels

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: energy → utility, particle conservation → budget constraint, entropy → market equilibrium
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: closed physical system → economy with convex feasible allocations

notes: no other primitives apply; this is a pure continuous/discrete toggle of the same phenomenon

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: priors and posteriors reinterpreted as neural network parameters and distributions over weights
primitive_reasons.stochastic_toggle: deterministic symbolic computation → sampling-based stochastic networks

primitive_reasons.continuity_toggle: discrete oscillator index → continuous momentum k

notes: ladder algebra preserved, no causal inversion or stochastic change
